title: NYISO LMP Real Time Hourly JSON API
description:
Real-time LMPs in hourly intervals as reported by NYISO.

Includes all zone and generator level data. The location types present are:

Generator
Zone
NOTE: in NYISO's raw data, a negative congestion component results in a higher LMP value, which is the opposite of other ISOs. Thus, we flip the sign on the congestion component before inserting into our database to be consistent with other ISOs. This means that in our database, LMP = Energy + Congestion + Loss.
